title: सम्पर्क
content:
Setopati is best and reliable online portal started by journalists with experience of two decades, exhausted by the vagaries of corporate media stymieing the journalistic pursuit. We strive to present the truth as it is and are guided solely by the public good. We are accountable to no one but our readers. We have a much larger Nepali language team that generates a broader range of content.
